privileged_info_summary: The task creates a custom Moodle role named 'Course Auditor' (shortname: courseauditor) with three legitimate Moodle capabilities set to Allow: moodle/course:view, moodle/grade:viewall, and moodle/course:viewparticipants. The role is configured for Course context assignment and assigned to the synthetic user 'teacher2' (Dr. Martinez) in the synthetic course 'ENG201' (Engineering Mechanics). All data is synthetically generated by the setup scripts.
